svg.title: LiU-Courses data flow diagram v5
svg.desc: Data flow with corrected frontend hierarchy and simplified Firebase Authentication label

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user interact with LiU-Courses?')
sendPrompt('How does Firebase Authentication work in LiU-Courses?')
sendPrompt('How do Firestore Security Rules use request.auth.uid?')
sendPrompt('How does the notifications subcollection work?')
sendPrompt('How does the courseRequests subcollection work?')
sendPrompt('How does sharedAccess control profile visibility?')

svg.text: onSnapshot — real-time listener pushes changes back to React

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the React UI update after a Firestore change?')
g.text: Updated UI — courses, requests, sharing, notifications
